## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Translation update
- [ ] Resource update
- [ ] Lab writeup

## Checklist

- [ ] I used a conventional commit message.
- [ ] I kept unrelated topics in separate commits.
- [ ] I checked local Markdown links when links changed.
- [ ] I updated the Chinese or English mirror when needed.
- [ ] I removed secrets, tokens, flags, VPN files, and private screenshots.
- [ ] I used official or stable references when factual accuracy matters.
